title: Mexican Tacos
description: A classic Mexican dish with a twist using algerian spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spiced Ground Beef
ingredients.notes: ground beef crumbled with algerian spices

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Algerian Spiced Ground Beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces.
Add the diced tomato and cook until the tomato is softened.
Warm the boiled tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef and tomato mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of cheese, diced avocado, and a dollop of sour cream.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
